data.title: Court Grants 60-Day Pause in Binance, SEC Dispute
data.description:
The 60-day pause may prompt other crypto giants like Ripple and Coinbase to reassess their legal disputes under a new SEC.
source: https://decrypt.co/305943/court-grants-60-day-pause-in-binance-sec-dispute

data.title: Texas Lawmaker Reintroduces Bill For Bitcoin Strategic Reserve
data.description: According to Foresight News, Texas State Senator Charles Schwertner has reintroduced a bill aimed at establishing a strategic reserve for Bitcoin, with provisions to expand investments to other cryptocurrencies. The proposed legislation, SB 778, restricts the state government to purchasing and holding Bitcoin without using it for other operations. Meanwhile, SB 21 broadens the scope, allowing investments in cryptocurrencies that maintain a market value of at least $500 billion throughout the year. Currently, Bitcoin is the only cryptocurrency meeting this criterion. The previous version of the bill, introduced in January, focused primarily on Bitcoin.

data.title: Texas Lawmakers Reintroduce Bill For Strategic Bitcoin Reserve
data.description: According to Odaily, Texas lawmakers have reintroduced a bill aimed at establishing a strategic Bitcoin reserve, now designated as SB 21, which permits investment in additional cryptocurrencies. Senator Charles Schwertner announced the bill on February 12, highlighting its potential to make Texas the first state to establish a cryptocurrency reserve, potentially fostering innovation and financial freedom. This new legislation builds on SB 778, introduced in January, which primarily focused on Bitcoin. While SB 778 restricted the state government to purchasing and holding Bitcoin without using it for other operations, SB 21 expands the scope to allow investment in cryptocurrencies maintaining a market value of at least $500 billion throughout the year. Currently, Bitcoin is the only cryptocurrency meeting this criterion.

data.title: Metya and OKX Wallet launch Valentine’s Day special event, participate to win 52,000 USDT rewards
data.description:
Official news, Metya and OKX Wallet jointly launched a Valentine's Day special event, the event time is from 13:20 on February 14, 2025 to 13:20 on March 14, 2025 (UTC+8). During the event, users who complete the designated tasks will have the opportunity to share a total of 52,000 USDT in MET rewards.
Metya is an AI-driven Web3 social dating platform that combines AI Agent and DePIN models to provide users with smart matching, interest-based social and decentralized value growth experience. The platform creates an immersive social ecosystem through the Staking mechanism and incentive system, enabling users to establish real connections in the Web3 world and obtain long-term benefits.

data.title: Texas lawmakers resubmit Bitcoin Reserve Act to expand to include other cryptocurrencies
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Texas lawmakers have reintroduced a bill aimed at establishing a strategic Bitcoin reserve, now designated as SB 21, which allows investments in additional cryptocurrencies. Senator Charles Schwertner announced the bill on February 12, emphasizing that it would make the state the first to establish a cryptocurrency reserve, potentially promoting innovation and "financial freedom." The new legislation builds on SB 778, an old bill introduced in January of this year that focuses on Bitcoin. SB 778 restricts state governments to only purchasing and holding Bitcoin and not using it for other operations, while SB 21 expands the scope to allow investments in cryptocurrencies that maintain a market value of at least $500 billion in a year. However, currently, Bitcoin is the only cryptocurrency that meets this criterion. (Jinshi)

data.title: AscendEX will launch Broccoli (BROCCOLI4)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch Broccoli (BROCCOLI4) for the first time at 16:00 on February 14, opening the BROCCOLI4/USDT trading pair, and recharge is now open.
AscendEX (formerly BitMax) is a fast and comprehensive trading platform for Memecoin. The Meme Research Institute team under the platform selects high-quality Memes for listing based on on-chain data and project background. The platform's Memecoin first launch rate is as high as 80%.

data.title: SHELL has risen above 0.5 USDT. Since its launch on LBank, the highest increase has exceeded 5,700%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: LBank market data shows: SHELL rose above 0.5USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.58 USDT, and is currently quoted at 0.37 USDT. The 24-hour increase is 3,600%. Since the launch of LBank, the current maximum increase has exceeded 5,700%, and the current market value is approximately US$100 million.

data.title: Planet Lunch News
The LAYER yield of the Bitget Launchpool project is temporarily reported at 305.68% APR
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Launchpool project Solayer (LAYER) has been opened for investment, with a total prize pool of 434,000 LAYER. As of press time, the current yield is temporarily reported at 305.68% APR. The lock-up opening time is from 22:00 on February 13 to 22:00 on February 16 (UTC+8).

data.title: FULLSEND rose above 0.09 USDT. Since its listing on LBank, the highest increase has exceeded 810%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: FULLSEND rose above 0.09USDT, reaching a high of 0.092USDT. The current price is 0.077USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 381%. Since its launch on LBank, the highest increase has exceeded 810%. The current market value is approximately US$77 million.
